commit.subject: LU-13759 tests: debug patch not for review
commit.message:
LU-13759 tests: debug patch not for review

Running sanity-dom with ONLY=20 ONLY_REPEAT doesn't seem
to work in autotest, but works on local VMs.  Let's see
what is the cause of these differences.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-dom env=ONLY=sanityn
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia94bdd826dec746938285f2079d380688aa778d3
